name: personalize-wppconnect-cliente-flow
description: Port local do fluxo cliente da Personalize para WPPConnect, com criação verificada das listas reais do WhatsApp Business por cor, preservação das listas manuais, recuperação imediata das sessões ativas após reinício, links em legendas de imagem e finalização em nota do contato.

scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:readiness && npm run test:handoff
scripts.check: node --check src/start-with-required-labels.js && node --check src/core/handoffPreload.js && node --check src/core/resetCleanupPreload.js && node --check src/core/customerFlowFixPreload.js && node --check src/core/preferredSellerNotePreload.js && node --check src/core/completedFlowSilencePreload.js && node --check src/core/runtimeReliabilityPreload.js && node --check src/core/supportAndServicesPreload.js && node --check src/core/exactAcknowledgementPreload.js && node --check src/core/bufferStagePolicyPreload.js && node --check src/core/vpsReadinessPreload.js && node --check src/core/idempotentServiceLabels.js && node --check src/core/lidServiceLabelFix.js && node --check src/core/requiredLabelsStartup.js && node --check src/bootstrap.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/core/bufferManager.js && node --check src/core/chatTaskQueue.js && node --check src/core/messageExperience.js && node --check src/core/menuCatalog.js && node --check src/core/messages.js && node --check src/core/outboundTracker.js && node --check src/core/parsers.js && node --check src/core/sellerHandoff.js && node --check src/domain/acrilicoThickness.js && node --check src/services/botActivityStore.js && node --check src/services/contactIdentity.js && node --check src/services/systemStateStore.js && node --check src/services/humanControlStore.js && node --check src/services/leadStore.js && node --check src/services/wppconnectClient.js && node --check src/core/allowedClient.js && node --check src/core/serviceLabels.js && node --check src/core/startupLabelAudit.js && node --check src/core/mostruario.js && node --check src/flow/customerFlow.js && node --check scripts/test-flow.js && node --check scripts/test-labels.js && node --check scripts/test-readiness.js && node --check scripts/test-handoff-readiness.js && node --check scripts/session-access-proxy.js && node --check ecosystem.config.cjs
